[[Jamoh Hogra]] spent a fortune on his own personal '''battle armor''', fearing the consequences of a raid on a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] dreadnought, only to be, ironically enough, killed in the bath. This armor increased the strength of the wearer and made them immune to critical hits. His armor eventually made its way to [[Eli Gand]], a merchant on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
